title: story.heartbeat
description: Emitted by story-phase.js inside a Story's implementation loop. Surfaces the in-progress Story as an inspectable ledger event so /epic-deliver's host-loop reconciler can confirm a long Story is still making forward progress between dispatch and merge — distinct from story.dispatch.start (one per Story per attempt) and story.merged (one per Story per close). The 3-tier hierarchy has no child Task tickets, so the heartbeat carries phase info only.
